ham: Hello, aapke mutual fund SIP ke liye ₹5,000 deduction 15-04-2026 ko hua hai. Agar koi query ho to apne account me login kare ya support se sampark kare.
spam: Hey! Yeh aapke mobile service provider se baat hai. Humne dekha ki aapke account me eSIM upgrade pending hai. Kripya <URL> click karke apna eSIM activate kare. 24 ghante ke andar complete na kare to aapka service suspend ho jayega. Dhanyavaad!
